name: mercantile/product-attributes
title: Product Attributes
description: Renders the WooCommerce product attributes table (material, care, capacity, fit, weight, dimensions, etc.) inline. Wraps wc_display_product_attributes() so the same table WC normally puts inside its 'Additional information' tab can live elsewhere on the single-product template — typically the Details sidebar panel. Outputs nothing if no attributes are set, so it degrades gracefully on products that haven't been populated.
